name: kargha
description: The kargha frontend skill pipeline — plan → build → validate.

metadata.description: Stack-agnostic frontend skills: design-prototype export → vertical-slice tickets → implementation in a worktree → visual validation.

plugins.name: kargha
plugins.description: Frontend pipeline: plan vertical-slice tickets from a design export (kargha-plan), build one in an isolated git worktree and open a PR (kargha-build), and validate visual fidelity against the design prototype (kargha-validate). Resolves the project's stack up front; not tied to any framework, token system, data layer, or ticketing tool.
